overall.description: A nighttime drive through a futuristic coastal highway in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit palm tree-lined roads with a glowing metropolis in the background. The camera navigates winding curves past a prominent transmission tower while light traffic passes by on wet reflective asphalt.

events.description: black sedan passes by in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: cruising along the winding highway with the futuristic city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving downhill in the opposite lane

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with illuminated glass skyscrapers and neon billboards
tall palm trees lining both sides of the highway
tall curved poles with horizontal LED light bars emitting white light
yellow concrete barriers with embedded orange LED strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic coastal highway at night, with the camera driving forward along a wet asphalt road. The glowing city skyline dominates the distant view while palm trees and modern LED streetlights line the route. A black sedan passes by in the opposite lane as the vehicle navigates the gentle curve.

events.description: small green compact car passes by heading downhill

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved highway while passing oncoming traffic, with the transmission tower becoming prominent on the right

notable_agents.action: small green compact car with headlights on passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive red and white lattice tower with support cables and warning lights

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the winding highway as a massive transmission tower rises prominently on the right side. The city skyline shifts to the left as the road curves, and a small green compact car passes by in the opposite lane. The wet road surface reflects the neon streetlights and vehicle headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway away from city center

events.description: road curves sharply to the right along the hillside

agents.ego_description: driving through the darker, less urban section of the highway with hills on the right and sparse traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: large box truck driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: dark hillside with dense vegetation replacing the city view

segments.scene_description: The highway moves into a darker, more remote section with a hillside on the right covered in dense vegetation. The city skyline and transmission tower fade into the distance as the road winds through the terrain. A large box truck is visible ahead, and the surroundings become noticeably darker with fewer light sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway curve approaching transmission tower and city

events.description: transmission tower reappears on the left as the road curves back toward the city

agents.ego_description: navigating the final curves around the transmission tower with the city skyline returning to view ahead

entered.detail: massive red and white lattice tower now visible on the left side of the road
futuristic metropolis with illuminated buildings returning to view ahead

segments.scene_description: The road curves back toward the urban area, bringing the massive transmission tower into view on the left and the glowing city skyline back into the center of the frame. The vehicle navigates the final winding curves of the highway, passing the tower structure as the metropolitan lights grow brighter ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a futuristic coastal highway that winds away from a glowing metropolis into a dark wilderness before curving back toward the city lights. It begins on a wet asphalt road lined with LED streetlights and palm trees, passing a black sedan as the distant skyline dominates the horizon. As the road curves, the scene shifts to reveal a massive transmission tower on the right and a small green car passing by, with the neon lights reflecting vividly off the damp surface. The environment then transitions into a remote, darker stretch where the city fades and the road winds past a vegetated hillside and a large box truck. Finally, the highway curves back toward the urban center, bringing the transmission tower into view on the left as the metropolitan skyline grows brighter and more central in the frame.
